programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: Mayron Hughes may be one of the most sought after basketball players in the country, but the mysterious death of his former agents could threaten everything. The star athlete hires New York's most valuable private eye in order to prove his own innocence. The case becomes increasingly complicated, and the Hammer must look at an entire roster of suspects in order to find the real killer. From Mayron father to his new agent to Mayron himself, anyone could be the culprit.

programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: A Hollywood actress with hometown ties to Hammer becomes the primary suspect in the gruesome murder of her own producer and boyfriend. In order to clear her name, she asks Mike to finds the real killer. The East Coast's best private eye must head West to get to the truth behind the lies. But as Hammer conducts his investigation, the situation in Malibu turns sticky, and he discovers that nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: It's Devil's Night in New York, and this year's Halloween festivities prove especially deadly. Before their date, Mike Hammer's love interest is murdered in her own apartment. With his heart broken and his own life on the line, Hammer must track down the heinous murderer. With Hammer's friends being targeted, he discovers a pattern that points to a cultist killer that he had locked up before. Mike must solve the case quickly, or he could be next.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Paulo Games takes on Wayna Reid in a clash of skill and heart, while David Simpson squares off with Jeremy Smith in a fight where every strike counts. Edgard Plazaola battles Gary Fox in a showdown of raw power, and Leonardo Perdomo faces Arnold Adams in a war that will solidify Perdomo's place in BKFC.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Jancarlos Rivera collides with Isaiah Garcia in a clash of speed and power, while Chris Garcia takes on Austin Lewis in a battle where every punch matters. Bobby Henry meets Stash Kuykendall in a fight fueled by grit and determination. But all eyes are on Yoel Romero as he enters the BKFC circle against Theo Doukas.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: The UK takes center stage. Dec Spelman squares off with Dawid Chylinski in a clash of power and precision, while Lewis Garside meets Jonno Chipchase in a battle that tests heart and toughness. Jonny Graham goes to war with Navid Mansouri in a fight full of grit and determination, and Aaron Chalmers faces Jack Fincham in a must-see showdown that promises non-stop action.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Heading across the pond for high-stakes action! Kiran Sewell clashes with Patryk Pientnik in a fight that demands speed and power, while Sean Weir takes on Joe Lister in a battle of grit and determination. Dawid Oskar goes toe-to-toe with Travis Dickinson in a clash full of intensity, and Jon Telfer faces Bart Krol in a showdown where only toughness survives.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Mike Trizano squares off with Jaime DeLeon in a fast-paced clash, while Quentin Gaskin battles Phil Caracappa in a fight fueled by power and precision. Oluwale Bamgbose goes head-to-head with Karl Roberson in a showdown of grit and determination. And stealing the spotlight-Mike Perry vs Jeremy Stephens-two elite killers ready to leave it all in the ring.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Pat Carroll goes toe-to-toe with Aleem Whitfield in a clash of power and precision, while Jeff Lentz faces Elijah Harris in a battle built on heart and grit. Jimmie Rivera meets Timmy Mason in a fight that promises nonstop action. But the spotlight shines the brightest on the women's super battle—Christine Ferea vs Jessica Borga—two warriors leaving everything in the ring.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Knuckle Up gets wild with Justin Street vs. AJ Craig, Nathan Rivera vs. Tommy Strydom, and Esteban Rodriguez vs. Zac Cavender. Three matchups where pride, heart, and fists do all the talking.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Knuckle Up delivers four battles you can't miss. Whitney vs. Brady, Angeloff vs. Smith, Evans vs. Ruelas, and Hauser vs. Valencia. Where every fighter came to finish!

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Knuckle Up brings the heat with Trinidad Snake vs. Sweeney, Hala vs. Ricchi, and Sakara vs. Camozzi. Three fights, zero quit, and everything on the line.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Knuckle Up heats up with Papa vs. Sikking, Melis vs. Bicchi, Wisniewski vs. Hepi, and Pugliesi vs. Thompson. Four fights, four wars, and no easy nights.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Paulo Games takes on Wayna Reid in a clash of skill and heart, while David Simpson squares off with Jeremy Smith in a fight where every strike counts. Edgard Plazaola battles Gary Fox in a showdown of raw power, and Leonardo Perdomo faces Arnold Adams in a war that will solidify Perdomo's place in BKFC.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Jancarlos Rivera collides with Isaiah Garcia in a clash of speed and power, while Chris Garcia takes on Austin Lewis in a battle where every punch matters. Bobby Henry meets Stash Kuykendall in a fight fueled by grit and determination. But all eyes are on Yoel Romero as he enters the BKFC circle against Theo Doukas.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: The UK takes center stage. Dec Spelman squares off with Dawid Chylinski in a clash of power and precision, while Lewis Garside meets Jonno Chipchase in a battle that tests heart and toughness. Jonny Graham goes to war with Navid Mansouri in a fight full of grit and determination, and Aaron Chalmers faces Jack Fincham in a must-see showdown that promises non-stop action.

programme.title: BKFC: Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Heading across the pond for high-stakes action! Dawid Oskar goes toe-to-toe with Travis Dickinson in a clash full of intensity, and Jon Telfer faces Bart Krol in a showdown where only toughness survives.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theater
programme.desc: A blind woman can a man awaiting hanging.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theater
programme.desc: A sheriff stands against his community to keep a young cowboy from a life of crime.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theater
programme.desc: Circumstances give a coward an opportunity to redeem himself.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theater
programme.desc: A determined woman risks a range war to create a cattle empire.

programme.title: The Quick and the Dead
programme.desc: In 1876 Wyoming, a mysterious stranger enters the lives of a homesteading couple after they are attacked by a ruthless gang.

programme.title: The Outriders
programme.desc: Three Confederate soldiers escape from Union captivity, only to be captured by bandit Keeley -- then spared when he discovers they're fellow Southerners. Keeley forces them to help with his next planned heist: stealing gold from a wagon train led by Don Antonio Chaves. The men insinuate themselves with Chaves in preparation for the robbery, but when Will (Joel McCrea) falls in love with a widow (Arlene Dahl) traveling with Chaves, the three men must decide whether to continue the plan.

programme.title: Forsaken
programme.desc: An embittered gunslinger attempts to make amends with his estranged reverend father while ruthless land-grabbers besiege their community.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: The Story of a horse and the boy who loved him! In this thrilling Western TV series a recent widower (Peter Graves) and owner of the Broken Wheel ranch takes in Joey, a young orphan boy. The ranch is also the home of a wild stallion named Fury, that none of the ranch hands can tameexcept young the boy! Joey and Fury form a special bond and embark upon lifetime adventures at the Broken Wheel Ranch!

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: The Story of a horse and the boy who loved him! In this thrilling Western TV series a recent widower (Peter Graves) and owner of the Broken Wheel ranch takes in Joey, a young orphan boy. The ranch is also the home of a wild stallion named Fury, that none of the ranch hands can tameexcept young the boy! Joey and Fury form a special bond and embark upon lifetime adventures at the Broken Wheel Ranch!

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: Jim has to sell some horses or lose the ranch. Pigott, the horse coper (dealer) offers to buy Fury but Jim says he is nor for sale. Later, when Joey wants to show Pigott the tricks that Fury can do, Pigott tricks Joey into being on free government land. Pigott then claims Fury and tries to get away.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: The Story of a horse and the boy who loved him! In this thrilling Western TV series a recent widower (Peter Graves) and owner of the Broken Wheel ranch takes in Joey, a young orphan boy. The ranch is also the home of a wild stallion named Fury, that none of the ranch hands can tameexcept young the boy! Joey and Fury form a special bond and embark upon lifetime adventures at the Broken Wheel Ranch!

programme.title: The Adventures of Champion
programme.desc: When a Indian chief who has just returned to his tribe is framed for murder, Ricky and Sandy try to prove his innocence before this followers go on the warpath.

programme.title: The Adventures of Champion
programme.desc: An outlaw who has escaped from custody joins his old gang and plans his next robbery - a rich bank that's not too far away.

programme.title: The Adventures of Champion
programme.desc: Rebel is hurt by a porcupine and Ricky gets help for him from a new southern doctor who just arrived in town.

programme.title: The Adventures of Champion
programme.desc: An old cowboy returns to visit Ricky and Sandy and help them round up a gang of desperadoes.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid and his English-mangling sidekick Pancho travel the old west in the grand tradition of the Lone Ranger, righting wrongs and fighting injustice wherever they find it.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: A crooked prosecutor robs quicksilver shipments, then uses chemical weapons to commit murder. Cisco and Pancho investigate.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Hired gun Reb Kittridge (Audie Murphy) goes to work in Montana for Matt Telford (Donald Randolph), who is looking to take over Dan Saxon's (Paul Kelly) fertile cattle land. What Reb doesn't bargain for is becoming a landowner himself after winning Saxon's property in a card game. Suddenly, he must work with Saxon and daughter Rita (Susan Cabot) to run the cattle to a rail line in order to make a mortgage payment. To stop him, Telford hires Reb's former partner, Johnny Lake (Charles Drake).

programme.title: Sierra
programme.desc: A tomboy frontier lawyer (Wanda Hendrix) finds an outlaw (Dean Jagger) and his son (Audie Murphy) hiding out from a false charge of murder.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: A crooked sheriff and his henchmen are attempting to continue their reign of terror by running a crooked election.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Longley rescues the lone survivor of a murderous stagecoach robbery, but the man refuses to help him identify the three killers.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Longley and the town's newspaper editor come to the assistance of a Hungarian peddler when he is attacked by local toughs.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Longley attempts to escort Yancey Lewis, a bank robber sentenced to spend five years in prison in a distant town.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister is captured by three escaped convicts who are trying to decide which one will kill him.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister is given new evidence that points to the innocence of an escaped convict.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance run into trouble while transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: Yancy Derringer
programme.desc: Yancy agrees to "shoot" Charles LeBow in a fake duel in order to smoke out the man who's trying to kill LeBow. During the mock funeral, they find LeBow's partner shot dead in what should have been LeBow's empty coffin. Colton, who suspects a larger conspiracy is at work, attempts to take Derringer in as a material witness, terms to which Yancy does not find himself obliged.

programme.title: Yancy Derringer
programme.desc: Pirate queen Coco LaSalle convinces Yancy to back her fighter against the mighty heavyweight called the Tennessee Slasher. While Derringer organizes the illegal fight away from the city administrator's prying eyes, he also searches for a cache of Spencer repeating rifles recently stolen from the federal armory at Port Hudson.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Three cousins who've inherited pieces of a treasure map from their late uncle hire Bat to lead them to the place they believe the money has been hidden.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: President Hayes and General Sherman are scheduled to make a stop in Dodge City, and Bat takes on the task of protecting the general during the election stop.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: Don Alejandro (George J. Lewis) becomes the target of a cat-and-mouse game that could mean the end of his life.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: Capt. Monastario tries to keep Don Alejandro (George J. Lewis) and Don Nacho Torres (Jan Arvan) from getting a fair trial.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: Capt. Monastario and Sgt. Garcia (Henry Calvin) come up with a secret plan they are sure will catch Zorro.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: Capt. Monastario attempts to discredit Zorro by hiring a criminal to impersonate him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh agrees to go to the lawless town of Bent Horn to bring back a man wanted for bank robbery and murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh sets out to help a wife locate her missing husband, but his mission meets with a resistant townspeople.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is bushwhacked by bounty hunters who must keep Josh from reporting their illegal "bounty game".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A sadistic pair of killers escape from prison. They hijack the stagecoach Josh is riding with a young prisoner

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall and a gentleman unaccustomed to the West must trek to safety across many miles of Apache territory.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall receives his most daunting assignment yet from a boy who has eight cents to pay: bring in Santa Claus.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Thieves are waiting to ambush mail carriers and Josh is hired to help insure that the mail will get through.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is knocked out by a posse who wants his prisoner.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh needs to get his wounded prisoner to Bannach in three days to prevent an innocent man from hanging.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a small town looking for Vic Warsaw but is told that Warsaw was killed the night before.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: 4 men break out of prison looking for revenge against Aben Starr who turned them in.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is resting when two bounty hunters bring in a dead man. The sheriff wants nothing to do with the pair.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A grieving father who is the town drunk hires Josh Randall with his last $30 to find his murdered son's body.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: At the request of his friend's wife, Randall comes to protect a war buddy in his bid for the town's mayoralty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople believe Josh killed him

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a man eager to turn himself in, provided Josh split the bounty with his wife

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is requested to meet a famous singer in Denver who has a job for him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh comes to the aid of an old friend who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh goes into the Apache camp to win the hand of a woman the Indians kidnapped as a child.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A young orphan girl wants Josh to find the parents she insists are still alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A father hires Josh to retrieve his son, an ideologue being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's browbeating about ending a decades-long feud gets him drafted to reconcile the hate-fueled hillbillies.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down a cheating gambler and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's stepson.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh tries to find a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall portrays a prisoner in order to trick his cellmate into leading authorities to the $50,000 he stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall rescues Jake Pringle and learns he's not the only one with an interest in keeping the killer alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Rogue City celebrates Randall for bringing in killer Jumbo Kane, but turns on Josh when Kane breaks loose.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After losing a quick draw contest, Josh serves as guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On the trail of a Cavalry deserter, Josh rides into a town ruled as a fiefdom of its psychopathic marshal.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son, Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh must bring a man back for murder. He has to outwit men bent on claiming the bounty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings a wanted man in to the Mesa City Sheriff, only to find he killed the sheriff's brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh looks for a man bitten by a rabid dog. He learns the law wanted him to lead them to his outlaw brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man shoots his brother over property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is captured and forced to work on a chain gang in a gold mine.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is tracking an escape artist who distracts a town, letting three guys rob the bank.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh signs on to help an amnesiac discover his identity.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After her father is murdered, a daughter wants immediate justice rather than wait for the wheels of justice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is determined to debunk the menace posed by a marauding monster that has smashed mining camps.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in "Doc" Phillips hoping he can lure Clell Fanning out as he has an old score to settle with Clell

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is arrested on a bogus horse-stealing charge.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To net a $1000 reward, Josh saves Tolliver Bender from a hanging so he can testify in a trial.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A woman hires Josh to clear her father on a false murder charge in a town that is not very welcoming.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired to chase a killer by his brother, who is about to hang for a crime his brother committed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason are on the trail of a karate expert accused of killing his employer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall learns "hate comes high" in a town who have hired killers to murder their fellow resident.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh captures a wanted recruit and returns him to the Army, but the Captain refuses to pay.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason track a fugitive in Texas wanted for murder in Arizona, but his wife claims he is innocent.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A dying man offers Josh $2000 to find his son, who ran away 15 years ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason are escorting prisoners to Leavenworth prison when a stranger begins following along behind.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is summoned for help when the Pinto bank is robbed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh expects a bounty for bringing in Daniel Trenner but his prisoner is stolen by the sheriff. Ex-army personnel want to stage an illegal trial accusing their former lieutenant of dereliction of duty

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by a woman to sober up Harry, a drunk who is also Josh's friend. She learned his wealthy brother who Harry hasn't seen in years is coming to visit so she wants Harry to be presentable.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and the beautiful prisoner he is transporting are on a three day trip while her partner is still on the loose. For once Josh may not follow through on obeying the law as they fall in love.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is on his way to River City to transport three convicts there to be hanged. The dangerous prisoners escape and appoint themselves the law, after the town is hit by a tornado, killing the sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A journalist accompanies Josh on his manhunt to get an exclusive story on a bounty hunter. Josh agrees to let him join him in the hunt for Jack Torrance but finds they have different methods.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh feels compelled to repay a debt to an old friend who's in jail and may hang. However, the friend escapes, forcing Josh to go on the hunt for him until it appears he died when he went over a cliff

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in outlaw Carlos Domingo, but he has to be released when the witness against him is killed. Josh concocts a surprise witness to testify against the notorious killer - his own mother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is sent for by the desperate men of Coronado. He is hired to convince the women of the town to come back to their men when they leave demanding that all towns men give up their guns for good.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in a man wanted for robbery but loses his reward. A well meaning doctor pays an innocent man to take the blame for his son, but the son sets out to kill the man to make sure he never tells

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in a town for rest just as the local bank has been robbed. A traveling medicine man knows the whereabouts of the suspect and wants Josh to help because he thinks the suspect is innocent.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A widow wants to hire/propose to Josh so she doesn't lose custody of her son. Josh served under her husband in the war. His mother now is trying to steal her grandson to take over the family fortune.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A woman asks Josh, an old friend, to help find her husband Frank - a bounty hunter out to settle a score. He wants to catch a young outlaw who shot him in the leg.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Randall has a sheriff bed a prisoner, the man's gang kidnaps the sheriff and two others and threatens to kill one per day until the man is freed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh is hired to protect a man and his pregnant wife from his the villagers who are angered when he refuses the town healing woman or "witch" from being present when his wife gives birth.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After Josh takes the task of finding a man and his wife's pet ewe, he becomes the butt of many jokes while cattlemen nearly hang him when he mentions sheep. His only clue is a gold bell the ewe wore.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a convicted killer escapes prison, Josh is hired to protect the woman whose testimony put him there. The woman's husband is a lawyer who says he has always been a coward and never carries a gun.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a town looking for a man who wants to hire him. When he goes to the man's room at the hotel, Josh is shot. He must figure out who shot him but the sheriff is ordering him out of town.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by Harry Weaver to track down his twin brother Pete, a wanted man. Harry is tired of being used by Pete, plus the law and bounty hunters are apt to mistake him for Pete.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw, the local sheriff who is a friend. The good sheriff who was seduced into robbing a bank by his girlfriend, convinces Josh to let him assist in her capture

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh takes a job protecting a deaf teenage girl and keeping everyone off the father's place for a day or two. Although initially bored, Josh starts to develop a relationship with the friendly girl.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh escorts a photographer to take a picture of his friend El Gato, who is a hilarious bandit living in the hills of Mexico with a small army. However, El Gato is new to photographs and leery.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A broke Josh is hired by a fearful man to help him elope with his sweetheart, Jane, the daughter of a local rancher. The girl's father is vehemently opposed to the marriage.

programme.desc: The performing comics include Emo Phillips, Sean Patton, Ian Edwards, Kurt Braunohler and Eliza Skinner.

programme.title: Richard Lewis: Magical Misery Tour
programme.desc: The comic proves to himself that he can still kill while performing sober in this nineties’ special, which features Lewis discussing his obsessions.

programme.title: Out on Stage
programme.desc: Zach Noe Towers hosts sixteen gay and lesbian stand-up comedians who discuss taboo subjects the way only they can.

programme.title: Josh Blue: Delete
programme.desc: With an undeniably unique world view, Blue explores preconceived notions of disability and how the community feels about being called “inspirational.”

programme.title: Joel McHale: Live From Pyongyang
programme.desc: Fan favorite Joel McHale shines in his first stand-up special with jokes on being mistaken for Daniel Tosh, feeding alligators in the South, and more.

programme.title: Jenny McCarthy's Dirty, Sexy, Funny
programme.desc: Jenny McCarthy’s brand of naughty comedy gets a boost from popular female comedians, including Tiffany Haddish, on the realities of being a woman.

programme.title: Margaret Cho: Psycho
programme.desc: The comic provocateur tackles a new list of taboos—from race to sexuality to Boko Haram—in front of a live audience at New York’s Town Hall.

programme.title: Gina Yashere: Laughing to America
programme.desc: Live from San Francisco, UK's top black female comedian Gina Yashere brings her unique insider-outsider perspective on America's hottest news.

programme.title: Miz Cracker: Here I Stand
programme.desc: The comedienne, drag queen and RuPaul's Drag Race runner-up discusses everything from sex and dating to quarantining, dieting and getting older.

programme.title: Bob the Drag Queen: This Is Wild
programme.desc: Fresh off a sold-out world tour, Bob the Drag Queen delivers sharp wit, personal stories, and nonstop laughs in this stand-up special.

programme.title: Ginger Minj: Bless Your Heart
programme.desc: In this musical memoir, an international Drag Superstar discusses dysfunctional family etiquette, haunted dolls, and the infamous “Florida Man.”

programme.title: Jay Jurden: Yes Ma'am
programme.desc: The comic delivers a punchline-filled love letter on how to navigate multiple identities—Black, queer, and Southern—all with his signature wit.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: All Over the Map
programme.desc: A comedy set and travelogue by comedian Jeff Dunham as he and his ventriloquist’s dummies perform globally from Iceland and London to Israel.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Quality Time
programme.desc: The comedian discusses why we aren’t honest about not wanting to attend events, lying to children, and so much more in this hilarious special.

programme.title: Mike Birbiglia: My Girlfriend's Boyfriend
programme.desc: Comic Mike Birbiglia takes us on a painfully honest and hilariously entertaining journey through a lifetime of romantic bungles and missteps.

programme.title: Gary Owen: Black Famous
programme.desc: This last year has been unlike any other: COVID, lockdowns, and for Gary, it has also included a divorce and family insanity unlike any other; up until now, Gary hasn't been able to speak about what really happened.

programme.title: Mark Christopher Lawrence: Clean Outta Compton
programme.desc: Character actor, stand-up comedian, and voice-over artist Mark Christopher Lawrence brings his comedy to the Dry Bar stage.

programme.title: Kate Willett: Loopholes
programme.desc: In this new, laugh-out-loud half-hour comedy special, comedian Kate Willett dives deep and dirty into the world of sex and feminism.

programme.title: Aaron Karo: The Rest Is History
programme.desc: In his first one-hour stand-up special, funnyman Aaron Karo raises the comedy bar as he uncorks his witty observations on bridesmaids' speeches, tanked-up friends who always start fights and the perils of being a 30-year-old bachelor.

programme.title: BeBe Zahara Benet: Africa Is Not a Country
programme.desc: Pioneering entertainer BeBe Zahara Benet recounts immigrating to America through unexpected audience interactions and razor-sharp social commentary.

programme.title: Brian Gaar: Jokes I Wrote at Work
programme.desc: In his first hour-long comedy special, Twitter sensation Brian Gaar tackles everything from the challenges of fatherhood to trying to keep his gamer cred in his 30s. Filmed live at the Spider House Ballroom in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin: Undeniable
programme.desc: Eddie Griffin brings his blunt and undeniable style to this stand-up set about athletes and racial stereotypes, relationships, and human mistakes.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin: You Can Tell 'Em I Said It
programme.desc: The excitable comic again proves why he is one of the world’s premiere funnymen, ripping into racial stereotypes, Viagra, the First Lady, and more.

programme.title: Finesse Mitchell: The Spirit Told Me to Tell You
programme.desc: The Saturday Night Live alum discusses acclimating to the Los Angeles attitude, night clubs, and how he keeps his marriage healthy.

programme.title: Ian Abramson: The Heist
programme.desc: Comedian Ian Abramson mixes performance art and stand-up to create one of history's most bananas comedy specials.

programme.title: Jay Nog: Something From Nothing
programme.desc: Comedian Jay Nog takes to the parking lot of a diner in Queens, New York when the COVID pandemic leaves him with nowhere to perform.

programme.title: Jeff Allen: I Can Laugh About It Now
programme.desc: The comedian discusses his life’s difficulties including addiction, bankruptcy, and how to overcome tragedy by making lemonade out of lemons.

programme.title: Jeff Allen: Honor Thy Wife
programme.desc: The laugh-out-loud funny stand up comedian focuses his special on the hilarious highs and relatable lows of everyday married life.

programme.title: Kevin James Thornton: Be Yourself
programme.desc: The comic takes the audience on a coming-of-age journey, talking about relatable yet embarrassing stories we all share trying to fit into our skin.

programme.title: Michael Ian Black: Noted Expert
programme.desc: You know him from his hilarious work in sketch, TV, and film, but the comedian’s NYC special takes his deadpan delivery to a whole new level.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Minding the Monsters
programme.desc: The comedian and ventriloquist extraordinaire, along with this felt friends, visits a haunted house where hilarious chaos ensues.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Spark of Insanity
programme.desc: Jeff and his felt friends Walter, Melvin the Superhero Guy, Peanut, and others share their latest and greatest thoughts about our times.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Unhinged in Hollywood
programme.desc: Previously unseen stand-up comedy by Jeff Dunham; sketches that include popular characters; Brad Paisley performs; special appearances by comic Chris Parnell and former UFC champion Chuck Liddell.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Animal wrangler Joan Embery brings a rare Canadian Lynx to the show, and actor Ron Silver also visits.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m - contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from 'the Banker,' in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant's chosen briefcase.

programme.title: 1 vs. 100
programme.desc: Professional dancer Carrie Ann Inaba hosts this show in which a contestant can win $50,000. The contestant, known as the One, competes with a mob of 100 other players by answering questions. When the One answers correctly, each member of the mob that answered incorrectly is eliminated. The One earns money for each mob member who is eliminated. If the One can eliminate the entire mob, he wins $50,000. But if the One gets a question wrong, he is eliminated and the remaining mob members split his winnings.

programme.desc: From singing Pastors to Wookies, this week is jammed pack with Characters, who battle it out on the Qualifier with amusing attempts at the inconceivable Field Goal Swing. Its no easy task to earn a spot in the Wipeout Zone this week with the Dreadmill, sorting the men from the boys. Contestants must dodge the wrecking ball while shooting basketballs. programme.desc: The competition heats up as the 4 remaining junior home cooks must prepare 20 crème brulees. The home cook who successfully brulees the most cremes in the allotted time will earn a significant advantage in the next elimination challenge. The two contestants who impress the judges the most will earn their spot in the finale and be one step closer to the MASTERCHEF JUNIOR title.

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In a flower shop on Skid Row, a clumsy young employee is turned into a killer when the talking plant he’s nurturing requires human blood to thrive.

programme.title: Deadcon
programme.desc: A group of young celebrities must unravel the mystery behind a vengeful spirit at the biggest digital event of the year, Viewcon.

programme.title: Nosferatu The Vampyre
programme.desc: Jonathan and Lucy live in Wismar and the Count wants a house there. Varna is a port on the Black Sea, close to Dracula's castle.

programme.title: The Toolbox Murders
programme.desc: A deranged handyman murders 'immoral' women with the tools of his trade -- claw-hammers, screwdrivers, power drills and even a deadly nail gun!

programme.title: The House on Sorority Row
programme.desc: After a prank goes terribly wrong, a group of sorority sisters are picked off one by one. Who is this mysterious stalker and can they be stopped?

programme.title: Silent Night, Deadly Night Part 2
programme.desc: A mental patient tells his psychiatrist how he became a killer, after his brother died during their childhood, because of a certain Mother Superior.

programme.title: 50 States of Fright
programme.desc: A group of ghost-debunking friends visits the supposedly haunted Stanley Hotel, but when Kyle sneaks down to explore the basement tunnels, the results are life-shattering.

programme.title: 50 States of Fright
programme.desc: Obsessed with her beauty, Heather insists on an arm replacement made of gold, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: 50 States of Fright
programme.desc: Dave goes against Heather's last wish to get out of debt, but when someone breaks a promise, the fallout can be deadly.

programme.title: The Exorcist III
programme.desc: A police lieutenant seeks answers in a psychiatric ward, when he ties a string of current murders to those of a serial killer executed long ago.

programme.title: Masters of Horror
programme.desc: Jeffrey Combs (RE-ANIMATOR) stars as the legendary writer Edgar Allen Poe, driven to debt and drunken folly by a world cruelly indifferent to his poetry.

programme.title: Masters of Horror
programme.desc: What if everything we believe about our sacred icons of American history turned out to be a complete lie? Suppose, for example, that the Father of our Country was actually a cannibal?

programme.title: Fear Itself
programme.desc: A group of cops in an isolated precinct spend the night guarding a serial killer who may or may not be able to assume the identity of his last "meal."

programme.title: Fear Itself
programme.desc: While left alone in an isolated house, a young writer suffering from terrifying visions during sleep paralysis realizes that these hallucinations may actually be a life-threatening reality.

programme.title: Alligator
programme.desc: After it’s flushed down the toilet, a baby alligator grows to monstrous size as it prowls the city sewers. Chaos erupts when it comes to the surface.

programme.title: Nightbreed
programme.desc: Aaron Boone (Craig Sheffer) is haunted by terrifying nightmares of a city of monsters. He goes to see a psychiatrist, Dr. Decker (David Cronenberg), for help. But what Boone doesn't know is that Decker is really a serial killer. Decker frames Boone to take the fall for his murders, and Boone is killed by the police. But Boone is brought back to life by the monsters of his dreams, the Nightbreed, who in turn join Boone in his quest to stop Decker from killing again.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A group of strangers struggle to fend off an attack of bloodthirsty zombies while barricading themselves inside a rural Pennsylvania farmhouse.

programme.title: Stepfather II
programme.desc: After cheating death by surviving being both stabbed and shot, psychotic killer Jerry (Terry O'Quinn) is placed in a mental institution, but he soon murders his doctor and escapes. Taking on a dead man's identity, he moves to an upscale neighborhood in Los Angeles and sets his sights on local woman Carol (Meg Foster), slowly winning her heart. Carol's son, Todd (Jonathan Brandis), grows suspicious of his mom's new lover, however, and tensions reach the boiling point at the couple's wedding.

programme.title: Stepfather III: Father's Day
programme.desc: An escaped madman (Robert Wightman) romances a California divorcee; luckily her son knows how to use a computer.

programme.title: Messiah of Evil
programme.desc: After receiving unsettling letters from her artist father, a woman travels to a seaside California town to find it governed by a strange, undead cult.

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: Trish's slumber party for her basketball teammates includes an unexpected guest.

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Following the death of her family, Angela is sent to a camp for the summer. After her arrival, brutal accidents begin to kill the other campers.

programme.title: Dog Soldiers
programme.desc: Deep in the Scotland wilderness during a routine military exercise, British soldiers are plunged into a terrifying nightmare of unlikely enemies.

programme.title: Hell House LLC
programme.desc: Five years after the deadly opening night of a Halloween attraction, a documentary film crew investigates the haunted house where it all took place.

programme.title: Mortuary
programme.desc: Christie Parson suspects her father’s recent drowning was no accident but, as she gets closer to the truth, she discovers a darker secret.

programme.title: Masters of Horror
programme.desc: A house for unpublished writers to live in while they continue to pile up rejection letters is haunted by more than just the specter of failure: There is the ghost of a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Rabbids
programme.desc: After finding a superhero comic book, the Rabbids decide to turn their leader into Super Rabbid.

programme.title: Rabbids
programme.desc: A Rabbid has fun playing a game where he suddenly jumps out of a box to surprise his friends. But the silly game quickly turns into an epic story of friendship between the Rabbid and his box…

programme.title: Rabbids
programme.desc: An old man makes Rabbid-shaped marionette. The Rabbids waste no time in stealing the puppet, while one them stays on the premises. The old man mistakes the live Rabbid for his puppet, thinking it has miraculously come to life.

programme.title: Rabbids
programme.desc: Two Rabbids use sticks to play at being Knights. A third wants to play but doesn't have one. He goes on a quest to find a precious stick, but only finds a ginormous piece of wood! Getting it back into the city won't be easy.

programme.title: Rabbids

programme.desc: Journalists Clive Myrie and Reeta Chakrabarti take a rocking horse to a Lincoln auction.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty Don is asked to rescue two nightmare outside spaces. In Salisbury, newly engaged Glenn and Zoe want a brand new garden and most of all they are desperate to produce flowers for their wedding. Currently their steeply sloping garden is completely unusable.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: In Leyton, Tariq and Sairah want to turn their dumping ground of a back yard into a sumptuous award-winning garden, suitable for entertaining friends and family. Both have competitive jobs in the banking sector and are used to winning at work but when it comes to gardening, they don't know where to begin.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: As the days get shorter, it is a busy time in the garden. Monty Don cracks on with his seasonal tasks at Longmeadow, giving hints and tips along the way. Carol Klein visits first-time gardeners Dan and Dominique for the very last time.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don is at Longmeadow sharing a wealth of tips and ideas on how to keep your garden looking good all year long. He tackles some urgent pruning, and reveals some of the projects he's got in store over the coming months.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Hellebores, the jewels of the early spring border, come under the spotlight on this show. Monty Don shares his top tips on how to get the best from them. Carol Klein visits a couple who have just moved into a bungalow with a badly neglected garden.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don explains why he thinks that the once-popular chrysanthemum is worth revisiting and Joe Swift has some helpful suggestions if you're thinking of giving your garden a bit of a spring revamp.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don plants up a new bed of asparagus and shows us how to lift and divide hostas. On our second visit to South Africa, we explore the conditions that allow agapanthus to thrive in the wild.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: At Longmeadow, Monty Don breaks ground for his new pond and Carol Klein pays Geoff and Sally Davis another visit in their Somerset garden. Their overgrown shrubs are in need of a jolly good haircut, but they haven't a clue where to begin.

programme.title: Kew on a Plate
programme.desc: It is spring at Kew and after a long, dark winter, nature is coming back to life. Raymond makes his sublime version of rhubarb and custard and Kate finds out how a 12-year-old slave enabled vanilla to become the world's most popular flavour.

programme.title: Kew on a Plate
programme.desc: Summer has arrived at Kew and everything in Raymond Blanc and Kate Humble's garden is blooming. Butterflies and bees abound and there are new crops to tend, harvest and cook with. Everyone loves a carrot, particularly the carrot fly, so Raymond must protect his crop to ensure he has a good supply for his summer carrot stew.

programme.title: Kew on a Plate
programme.desc: It's autumn at Kew and the vegetable garden is set to produce a bumper harvest. Raymond Blanc and Kate Humble grow some autumnal favourites and cook them up. Kate finds out why the tomato was once considered to be a deadly poison.

programme.title: Kew on a Plate
programme.desc: The end of the year at Kew is fast approaching, winter is setting in, but some crops positively love the cold and Raymond learns how brassicas cope in this frosty season. Kate visits Kew's Millennium Seed Bank.

programme.title: The Secret History of the British Garden
programme.desc: Starting his journey at the sole surviving garden of the 1600s, Levens Hall in Cumbria, Monty sets out to investigate what the gardens of this age would have looked like and what influenced and inspired their creation.

programme.title: The Secret History of the British Garden
programme.desc: Monty bases himself at Rousham House in Oxfordshire, designed by one of the first practitioners of the landscape movement, William Kent. It has survived almost unchanged since its completion in 1741.

programme.title: The Secret History of the British Garden
programme.desc: Monty Don explores the extraordinary transformations that occurred throughout the 19th century. As a result of an expanding empire, scientific and technological innovation and social change, British gardens became more exotic, more colourful and more widely accessible than ever before.

programme.title: The Secret History of the British Garden
programme.desc: Monty Don concludes his journey through Britain's gardening heritage by looking at how the nation's gardens have evolved over the last hundred years. He looks at the profound effect that two world wars had on the attitude to gardens and gardening.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don makes a start by cutting his hedges and Carol Klein steps back in time when she visits a walled garden in the Scottish Borders.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don tackles the perennial problem of what to grow in the shade beneath a tree, Carol Klein takes a look at the crocosmia and we meet a gardener in Derbyshire who has spent a lifetime growing and showing gladioli.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: The team celebrate the bounty our gardens have to offer at this time of year as Carol Klein gathers wild blackberries, Monty Don is at Longmeadow, and we join a champion vegetable grower in Yorkshire as he prepares for the biggest show of the season.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don tackles autumn lawn maintenance tasks, Carol Klein is looking at burnets, and we meet a man who's dedicated himself to a North American prairie favourite, the echinacea.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty and the team are at RHS Rosemoor in Devon to find out about their fruit trees and sedum collection, and Joe visits Scampston Hall, home of a ten-year experiment in naturalistic planting by garden designer Piet Oudolf.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: As autumn unfolds in the garden, Monty Don and Nigel make the most of the season and prepare for the winter ahead. Meanwhile Carol Klein is in Surrey looking at wild and cultivated heathers.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty's dividing his Pulmonaria and gives advice on frost-protection, Joe visits a tropical oasis outside Bristol, and Carol looks at Rowans from around the world.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don prepares for his spring display and tackles slippery paths, Carol Klein visits a collection of Michaelmas daisies and we visit a veg grower with a show-stopping Halloween pumpkin.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty has tips and ideas for planting up garden pots to provide a focal point over the winter months, Rachel visits the tulips of Keukenhof, Joe visits Esther Rantzen's much-loved garden, and Carol visits Glebe Cottage.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: This time there's plenty to do to prepare for the season to come and Monty Don is clearing out spent crops and mulching his asparagus. Joe Swift's been to visit keen gardeners, Wayne and Geraldine Hemingway, to see how they combine sustainability with their designer-style. Carol Klein's exploring the history of the rose at Coughton Court, one of our best rose gardens and Monty plants a new rose of his own. What happens when you have to downsize and leave your much-loved garden?

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don prepares the flowering borders for winter and makes a bonfire, Carol celebrates our berry-laden hedgerows, and Rachel visits Julian Clary in his garden.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Carol is looking at one of the gems of early spring; the crocus, Joe visits a bog garden in west Wales, and Rachel visits a fabulous rose garden with over 2500 different varieties.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Carol looks at the spring delight that is the cyclamen, Joe visits a gardener taking on the challenges of gardening on the windswept Cornish coastline, and Monty tackles the problem of box blight.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty gives his pond a spring clean, Carol helps a family in Gloucestershire with their first garden, and Joe visits a gardener in Northumberland who copes with extremes of temperature.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty Don is asked to rescue two nightmare outside spaces. In Salisbury, newly engaged Glenn and Zoe want a brand new garden and most of all they are desperate to produce flowers for their wedding. Currently their steeply sloping garden is completely unusable.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty helps two families create dream gardens that are as much for the children as for the adults. In Doncaster, Nikki and John want a garden full of edible plants and fruit.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty Don visits two sets of ambitious gardeners, each facing challenges on a very different scale. One is a tiny urban courtyard in Hackney and the other is a outdoor area for a community.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Magnolias are the showstoppers of the tree world right now and to celebrate them in all their glory, James Alexander-Sinclair pays Borde Hill Garden in West Sussex, with its collection of magnificent champion trees, a visit.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Everything in the garden is shooting up so it's time to lift and divide perennials and Monty is doing just that with his ornamental grasses. In our third trip to South Africa, we discover where red hot pokers grow in the wild.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: As Monty's wildlife garden begins to take shape at Longmeadow, bees are very much at the forefront of his mind. He plants up a nectar-rich border that will attract all sorts of bees and other pollinating insects.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: With the hanging basket season well and truly underway, Joe Swift meets a florist in Surrey who has perfected the art of kokedama, a modern take on the hanging basket. Houseplants come under the spotlight too.

programme.title: Monty Don's Paradise Gardens
programme.desc: In Morocco, Monty discovers the wide variety of paradise gardens. He begins just outside the city of Marrakesh in an enormous royal walled meadow, The Agdal. From there he moves to the heart of the town where he comes upon a tiny garden where huge banana plants jostle with palms to create a secret paradise garden, a shelter from the busy world outside. And in another part of the city a rundown old palace has been turned into a stunning contemporary garden with a twist.

programme.title: Monty Don's Paradise Gardens
programme.desc: In Turkey Monty is dazzled by an extraordinary display of the Ottoman Empire's favourite flower, the tulip, and learns of its sacred significance. Travelling further East to India he encounters a new type of spirituality in the tomb gardens of the Mughal Empire. Stunning mausoleums were set in vast gardens as places where an earthly king could enter a divine paradise.

programme.title: Monty Don's Italian Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don conducts a personal grand tour around Italy's magnificent gardens from the luxurious retreats of the moneyed north to the lavish hideaways of the romantic south. In this episode, he's in and around Rome, a powerbase of emperors and popes, to explore gardens that are among some of the most extravagant and flamboyant ever created in history.

programme.title: Monty Don's Italian Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don is on a grand tour around Italy, this time visiting gardens both in Florence and around the sun-scorched Tuscan countryside. Monty discovers how, like a piece of sculpture, renaissance gardens were created as works of art, and how a group of Edwardian ex-pats mistakenly reinforced the idea that formal Italian gardens were flowerless.

programme.title: Monty Don's Italian Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don continues his grand garden tour of Italy. This time he is in Naples to visit some of the most sublime, romantic retreats in southern Italy. After all the formality of the green gardens around Rome and Florence, Monty seeks out idyllic horticultural gems set against the dramatic scenery of the Amalfi Coast to discover why, in the south, gardens are informal and, above all, filled with flowers.

programme.title: Monty Don's Italian Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don concludes his garden tour of Italy in the wealthy north where, in the Veneto and Lucca, extravagant pleasure gardens were created for flirtation and fun. In the Lakes, Monty meets up with the garden society, the Grandi Giardini Italiani, to peer over the fence at luxurious creations of the rich and famous. The journey ends on Lake Maggiore to see the most theatrical horticultural gem of Italy.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Sheena and James have saved hard to create their dream garden. The only trouble is, despite being a gardening enthusiast, Sheena has run aground in her efforts to create a garden that is green and tree-filled but also a nod to their coastal area.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Katie and Christian and their kids Max and Olivia live in Bitterne, near Southampton. They are suffering from a classic case of 'building work ruined the garden'. In fact, mum Katie calls it a `catastrophe' of a garden. Can Charlie and the Rich brothers save the day, despite having a budget of only £2,500? The garden also has to work as a space for both day and night. Christian works shifts, so he would like to use it late into the evening.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Rhiannon and Chris need the team's help with their new-build garden. It's dull and boring with nowhere to sit, no shade, and it's dominated by two huge garage walls, which flank it on either side. Lee and Flo have a budget of £3,500 to work with.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Carol Klein admires the true harbinger of spring, the daffodil. Also, a visit to dahlia enthusiast Darren Everest on his allotment in Kent, and Monty Don pots up his dahlia tubers, and offers tips for getting the best results later in the year.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don is giving his ornamental grasses an overhaul. He's got tips on how to lift and divide ones that have grown too large. Meanwhile, Rachel visits the stunning Trebah Garden in Cornwall to revel in their glorious collection of hydrangeas.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don finishes rejuvenating his dry garden, a sun baked corner of the garden that had become over-run by thuggish plants, and Carol Klein is in the rather exotic setting of Abbotsbury Subtropical Gardens in Dorset.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The story of Team Winchester shooters Zach Kienbaum and Desirae Edmunds is told. Theo Ribbs breaks down the shotgun sports while Chris Keefer, Casey Keefer, Paul Sawyer, Nikki Boxler and Gabe Adair have a friendly sporting clays competition.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The Pacific Northwest does not have the easiest conditions to train in for this shooting sports team. For this Seattle-based SST Ravens, this skeet and trap team finds that the challenging weather they train in comes in handy when competing. Also: Competition shooting tips form pro shooter Theo Ribbs.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Every spring brings a new opportunity to take a step forward & recall the memories of seasons past. World War II Veteran and retired Judge Arden Hill has spent most of his life chasing turkeys in the hills of Tennessee. Now in his 90’s, Arden doesn’t let age stand in the way of his love for spring turkey hunting. Also: patterning turkey shotguns and hunting spring gobblers.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Winchester introduces the Shoot United brand aimed at offering useful information and tips to the millions of new shooters entering the shooting sports. New York native and Midland University competitive shotgun shooter Amy Cawley and her journey as a student-athlete is followed. Also: Theo Ribbs gives shooting tips for competition and Foster Bartholow reviews Winchester AA Diamond Grade.

programme.desc: Featuring Capt. Jon Cooper & Joe Neber Sail fishing in the beautiful waters ofCosta Rica.

programme.title: Sail Kings
programme.desc: Featuring Capt. Charlie Scoble & Donnie Lang on a mother ship trip aboard the “TACKLE CENTER” to the Dry Tortugas

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Join Benny Spies of Team Winchester as he shares stories of his upbringing in South Dakota. From cherished family photos to duck seasons of the past, learn how a passion for hunting was ignited and became a way of life for Benny and his family.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: On opening day of Missouri’s gun season, hunters from around the state seek ridges and box blinds throughout the “Show Me” state in search of mature whitetail bucks. For Nikki Boxler and the Winchester Deer Camp, it’s no different. With Winchester’s in hand, Nikki and crew play cat and mouse with several mature bucks at Indian Hill Outfitters in Pike County.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Every season, just like clockwork, mission-driven longboards gobble their way across the plains of South Dakota, the cornfields of Iowa, the timbered ridges of Michigan and the cattle ground of Kansas looking for their soulmates in one of the most celebrated hunting seasons in America…the wild turkey breeding season. Join Team Winchester as they stalk, call, flank and roost boss gobblers into range from coast to coast.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including the stories. With the whitetail rut in the midwest winding down, the Winchester Life Crew of Chris Keefer, Casey Keefer, Nikki Boxler and Paul Sawyer head south to the Texas Panhandle with Winchesters in hand hoping to wrangle in a few Texas-sized giants.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In part 1 of the British episodes, Andy starts his road trip around the United Kingdom in the Cotswolds where he sets out to hunt and taste the beautiful venison that Michelin star chef, Mark Robinson has to offer. He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode Captain Brandon Branch will be fishing with his long time friend John Kreusch over in Steinhatchee Florida. It's no secret that a large number of Redfish call Steinhatchee home especially during the spring season. You know it's a good day when you have to leave em chewing, so sit back and enjoy some North Florida fishing catching action!

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode of Local Lines Captain Brandon Branch had the opportunity tofinally go fish Yankeetown Florida like never before with Captain Trey Mikell. As time has gone by Trey is establishing himself as one of the best guides in that area and he definitely didn’t disappoint on this trip

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode Captain Brandon Branch takes one of his good buddies from Diamond Fishing Products out for some Shallow Grouper action over in Crystal River Florida. Year after year this style of fishing is becoming more popular and provides trophy quality fish in less than 10ft of water

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode of Local Lines Captain Brandon Branch will be fishing with his tournament partner Captain Brian Sawyer. The goal from this trip is to show everyone what the nature coast has to offer 12 months out of the year!

programme.title: TRP
programme.desc: On today's how 2 Tuesday, we are testing 4 of my absolute favorite knots to tie braid to fluorocarbon. This episode has been requested by many throughout the years due to the high level of difficulty that comes along with tying these to lines together. The question with all of these episodes is always which of these knots is truly worth tying, today we find out!Watch now to enhance your skills and improve your fishing game! Don't forget to subscribe for more practical fishing tips and tutorials.Check out how this test compares to all the others I have done; get your FREE Knot Guide here! —https://bit.ly/3UnAeIPAll Socials ⎯https://linktr.ee/TomRowlandPodcastHow2Tuesday is presented by Danco Pliers!Danco Sports is an industry-leading manufacturer of pliers, knives, and accessories for anglers worldwide. Since our start in 2006, we have been committed to providing affordable, high-quality products and outstanding customer service to anglers and fishing leaders alike. Danco Pliers is located in Stuart, Florida, where we wear flip-flops to work year-round.Check out Danco here —https://bit.ly/tomrowlandpodcast2

programme.desc: Dan Cabela explores the model for community conservation in the Zambezi Delta of Mozambique, and responsibly harvests a Cape Buffalo bull on their behalf.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: CA returns to his old stomping grounds, chasing legend in familiar waters. Giants still roam here and feed on the smallest of offerings.

programme.desc: Captain Scott Walker fishes out of Hawks Cay with fellow Duck Key resident Captain Ariel Medero catching Blackfin Tunas and big Queen Snappers.

programme.title: Into The Blue

programme.title: Life On The Water
programme.desc: Captains Scott Walker and Ariel Medero fish with David Moss from the Nature Conservancy out of Hawks Cay sampling the bottom fishing and deep dropping. In between the action they learn about the Nature Conservancy’s mission to promote sustainable and transparent fishing practices.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger break in Plantation Boat Mart’s new 36’ Invincible with some muttons for dinner and an epic shallow water sailfish double.

programme.title: Reel Animals

programme.title: Rivers are Life
programme.desc: Fed by the Mekong River, Tonlé Sap Lake in Cambodia is not only home to hundreds of thousands of people living in the floating villages, it is also the source of 75% of Cambodia’s fish (equal to 60% of the country’s protein intake). Because of a combination of threats, from pollution to climate change, the densely populated area’s fish populations are dwindling – but locals are educating themselves on ways to make change. In this beautifully photographed award-winning film, we get a rare glimpse into life on the lake while learning how a dedicated conservation group is combatting plastic pollution.

programme.title: Rivers are Life
programme.desc: At age seven, Cash “The Conservation Kid” Daniels began leading cleanups along the Tennessee River in his hometown, Chattanooga. Six years later, Cash continues to make a significant impact on the river’s health by strategically collecting fishing waste and inspiring his peers across the world to protect the environment and all the wildlife he holds dear.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: Motorcycle junkie and Army veteran Dave Allen recounts the terrifying prospect of facing chemical warfare during Operation Desert Storm with host Jay Garstecki and special guest Paul Sr. from American Choppers.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Blair heads down to Miami with Capt. Brett Isackson in search of a bass normally found in South America.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Capt. Blair heads to Duck Key fishing with Capt. Drew Hall out of Hawks Cay Marina in search of deep water fish in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Back in San Diego and with Rockfish on the mind, the LK crew fish new grounds and depths to catch these iconic Southern California bottom fish. Along for the ride is pro snowboarder and friend Dave Downing to round out this epic rock cod fishing trip.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: With the drastic changes in the Southern California fishery over the past several years, it has been easy to get fixated on targeting large Bluefin tuna and going all out on what many have coined "big fish" fishing. On this episode Ali and Rush take advantage of the many other opportunities this time of year has to offer and switch focus back to the basics, targeting smaller yellowfin, bluefin, and mahi on bait.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Thinking about a travel fishing trip of a lifetime? Check out what the participants of the first Local Knowledge-Casa Vieja group trip have to say about our favorite lodge in this special edition episode!

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: What do you do when you fish for a living and get a day off? You go fishing! With weather on the forecast and a last minute cancelation, Rush calls long time friend Capt. Tony "Key Limey" Murphy to see what will bite before the cold front hits Key West.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: Motorcycle junkie and Army veteran Dave Allen recounts the terrifying prospect of facing chemical warfare during Operation Desert Storm with host Jay Garstecki and special guest Paul Sr. from American Choppers.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: Shot through the neck on Fort Hood in Texas, Green Beret John Arroyo recounts coming face to face with his attacker and Jesus blinding his would be killer.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: An Honor No One Wants: A Gold Star Family is the immediate family member(s) of a fallen soldier who died while serving in a time of conflict. Ginger Gilbert-Ravella honors the memory her husband…American hero Troy Gilbert.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: U.S. Marines combat correspondent Ken Plant tells of being captured and tortured as a POW.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Dan Cabela is on a mission to better understand how wild-harvested protein contributes economically and culturally to society in North America. Join him as he learns more about the Wild Harvest Initiative and sets out to harvest his own food for the freezer.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Travelling to Vancouver Island, Dan Cabela meets with tribal leader Chief Cootes to learn more about how the careful management of black bears offers economic benefits while maintaining cultural importance to his community.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Dan Cabela sets out to pursue, capture and aid in the conservation of the tallest land mammal in North America – the Moose.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Dan Cabela explores the challenges and research behind living with Africa’s most secretive predator - the Leopard.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: For Capt. Justin Leake, sight fishing the beach is one of the most productive, and FUN ways to fish. When that doesn’t work, Capt. Todd Jones suggests fishing an artificial reef, and as it turns out, that’s where dinner lives.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Meredith McCord arrives in late spring and joins Capt. Justin Leake on the hunt for a fish she’s never caught before. Lo and behold, it’s a day fit for a king.

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP puts away the spinning rods and light braid for an opportunity to target Largemouth Bass but the weather is not cooperating.

programme.title: Baitfuel Fishing Tournament
programme.desc: Qualifier 5 is the second event day in Cornwall, Ontario taking place on Lake St. Francis, part of the famed St. Lawrence Seaway.

programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss is at Highland Park Fish Camp, Speck fishing with Capt. James Hillman.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Crystal River, Fl, taking the Cayo out into the Gulf in search of Shallow Water Grouper.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Florida’s Big Bend, inshore fishing the Negative Low Tide on an Airboat!

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Guadalajara’s heritage runs deep. On the DIRT crew’s latest adventure, they explored the region’s rich history from volcanic highlands to secret surf coves. Chefs Xrysw Ruelas and Óscar Segundo sent Josh and co. to load up on locally grown coffee, spearfish between catching waves, and follow freshly harvested agave on its journey to becoming tequila. After learning the ropes of Mexico’s national sport, Charreria, and hitting up a Lucha Libre match, all the local flavors came together in a feast backed by thousands of years of tradition. There really is something special in the soil here.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.desc: On this episode of Huckberry Homes, we caught our good friend and photographer James Barkman out in the wild. He gave us a tour of his vintage "Yellow Submarine" inspired VW Van and broke down some of the modifications he has made to make this adventure bus feel more like home.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor meet up with Captain Nick LaBadie at Big Pine Key for an action packed day on the flats chasing tarpon, bonefish and permit for the elusive grand slam.

programme.title: TRP
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor run from Hawks Cay Resort up to Islamorada on a windy day to fish under the mangroves for Goliath grouper.

programme.title: TRP
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor join Captain Bryson Shaaber to fish the channels around Key West targeting big spring tarpon with live pinfish.

programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor launch out of Key Largo and fish their way up a creek filled with monsters.

programme.title: The Cast

With multiple species allowed including northern pike, the two teams are neck and neck after the first two periods. Due to bad weather on day 2, period 3 turned into a hour speed round where only keeper largemouth count.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: When the yellowtail at the islands refuse to play, it’s time to switch up the game plan. Ali and Rush pivot north of San Diego in search of hard-charging bluefin tuna during a multi-day mission aboard the 43’ custom ACI Catamaran "Killer Bee". Armed with the right crew, the right gear, and a never-quit mindset, the guys roll the dice on an overnight move—hoping to wake up to redemption and put a few quality bluefin on deck.

programme.title: Adventure Cities

programme.title: Destination Dive

Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In part 1 of the British episodes, Andy starts his road trip around the United Kingdom in the Cotswolds where he sets out to hunt and taste the beautiful venison that Michelin star chef, Mark Robinson has to offer. He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode Captain Brandon Branch will be fishing with his long time friend John Kreusch over in Steinhatchee Florida. It's no secret that a large number of Redfish call Steinhatchee home especially during the spring season. You know it's a good day when you have to leave em chewing, so sit back and enjoy some North Florida fishing catching action!

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode of Local Lines Captain Brandon Branch had the opportunity tofinally go fish Yankeetown Florida like never before with Captain Trey Mikell. As time has gone by Trey is establishing himself as one of the best guides in that area and he definitely didn’t disappoint on this trip

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode Captain Brandon Branch takes one of his good buddies from Diamond Fishing Products out for some Shallow Grouper action over in Crystal River Florida. programme.title: Local Lines

programme.title: TRP
programme.desc: On today's how 2 Tuesday, we are testing 4 of my absolute favorite knots to tie braid to fluorocarbon. This episode has been requested by many throughout the years due to the high level of difficulty that comes along with tying these to lines together. The question with all of these episodes is always which of these knots is truly worth tying, today we find out!Watch now to enhance your skills and improve your fishing game! Don't forget to subscribe for more practical fishing tips and tutorials.Check out how this test compares to all the others I have done; get your FREE Knot Guide here! —https://bit.ly/3UnAeIPAll Socials ⎯https://linktr.ee/TomRowlandPodcastHow2Tuesday is presented by Danco Pliers!Danco Sports is an industry-leading manufacturer of pliers, knives, and accessories for anglers worldwide. Since our start in 2006, we have been committed to providing affordable, high-quality products and outstanding customer service to anglers and fishing leaders alike. Danco Pliers is located in Stuart, Florida, where we wear flip-flops to work year-round.Check out Danco here —https://bit.ly/tomrowlandpodcast2
