programme.title: Rivers are Life
programme.desc: Fed by the Mekong River, Tonlé Sap Lake in Cambodia is not only home to hundreds of thousands of people living in the floating villages, it is also the source of 75% of Cambodia’s fish (equal to 60% of the country’s protein intake). Because of a combination of threats, from pollution to climate change, the densely populated area’s fish populations are dwindling – but locals are educating themselves on ways to make change. In this beautifully photographed award-winning film, we get a rare glimpse into life on the lake while learning how a dedicated conservation group is combatting plastic pollution.

programme.title: Rivers are Life
programme.desc: At age seven, Cash “The Conservation Kid” Daniels began leading cleanups along the Tennessee River in his hometown, Chattanooga. Six years later, Cash continues to make a significant impact on the river’s health by strategically collecting fishing waste and inspiring his peers across the world to protect the environment and all the wildlife he holds dear.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Guadalajara’s heritage runs deep. On the DIRT crew’s latest adventure, they explored the region’s rich history from volcanic highlands to secret surf coves. Chefs Xrysw Ruelas and Óscar Segundo sent Josh and co. to load up on locally grown coffee, spearfish between catching waves, and follow freshly harvested agave on its journey to becoming tequila. After learning the ropes of Mexico’s national sport, Charreria, and hitting up a Lucha Libre match, all the local flavors came together in a feast backed by thousands of years of tradition. There really is something special in the soil here.

Eduardo eventually agrees to allow Bob to perform at his club, but only under the condition that he play suitor to his second-oldest daughter, the beautiful Maria (Rita Hayworth).

Jones is hired by a newspaper to write about Mannion and starts dating Wilhelmina Clark (Jean Arthur). However, when Jones returns home one night, Mannion is waiting and demands the note so that he can roam freely.

Valued for her vocal and comedic talents by the renowned theater impresario Florenz Ziegfeld (Walter Pidgeon), Fanny thrives, but her relationship with her suave, imprisoned businessman husband, Nick Arnstein (Omar Sharif), is another story.

So, when Cheyenne Rogers (Glenn Ford), an old friend with a criminal past, rolls into town, Upton is immediately on edge. Cheyenne assures his pal that all that's behind him now. But when the town bank is robbed, Cheyenne becomes the locals' number one suspect. He'll have to prove his innocence to save himself and his friend's reputation.

programme.title: King of the Wild Horses

Along the way, he picks up Jess Burgess (Leo Gordon), a slighted former member of Slayton's gang, and American Indian local Johash (Pat Hogan), who has his own beef with the outlaws. programme.desc: Sebastian's high school friend asks for help when her business partner is killed at a gaming convention; FBI Special Agent Raymond Isler believes Adrian is the hacker that the Cyber Crimes division has been tracking for years.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A petty officer's murder leads the team to a night club where Pride's mother used to perform; Lasalle must return home to Alabama after receiving an unexpected call from his family.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The members of Team Scorpion brave subzero temperatures in Antarctica to save a United States Special Forces unit; Toby risks his life to save Happy.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Sylvester's father, a retired general, asks the team for help when he thinks a dictator in Africa has uncovered weapons of mass destruction from World War II.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The members of Team Scorpion are asked to help NASA with a top-secret rocket launch, but they must sabotage their own mission when Walter's date finds a bomb strapped to her chest.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: When a powerful earthquake hits Los Angeles, Team Scorpion must prevent a pinched gas line from causing a massive explosion.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Harry Langford enlists McGarrett and Danny's help to track down a teenage British royal who has run away while under his protection; Grover, Tani and Junior work a 25-year-old murder case after a mysterious videotape arrives at headquarters.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Duke is forced to steal crucial evidence from the police locker in exchange for his kidnapped granddaughter; Jerry goes under cover at a mental health facility to solve a murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett and Five-0 take on the mob when a former boss is killed; Junior's friend is on the run after witnessing the murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett joins Junior and his SEAL team on a mission to capture an elusive person who is holding his mentor hostage; Gerard Hirsch and Kamekona help Grover and Tani on a murder case involving art stolen by Nazis during World War II.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The team discovers a Russian spy ring hiding on Oahu when a Russian submarine appears off the coast.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: After McGarrett's CIA agent friend is killed, he lets himself be captured by the group he thinks is responsible to find the killer; Tani questions whether she should tell McGarrett about the murder weapon she found at Adam's house.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: When a vacationing father on a flight to Honolulu is kidnapped and forced to parachute midflight, Danny, Tani and Junior track him through the jungle to discover that he may not be who he seems; McGarrett is threatened with a secret from his past.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A heat wave hits Oahu, contributing to a spike in crime; McGarrett and Danny hunt down a bank thief; Tani and Junior's car is stolen while they're on duty; Kamekona incites a riot by price-gouging his ice.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Jerry accompanies Junior as he escorts a fallen soldier home to Oahu; McGarrett and Danny discover a body when they delve into the highly profitable black market for sand.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: On Halloween, Jerry and his friends search his childhood camp for evidence to a murder he witnessed as a boy; McGarrett investigates a little girl who drew pictures depicting the scene of a recent murder before it was discovered.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett crosses the line and is arrested while investigating the death of his former SEAL buddy who died while making an emergency landing on an aircraft carrier; Adam returns to Oahu with devastating news about his marriage.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett investigates a cold case that his grandfather and the famous Honolulu detective Chang Apana worked on in the 1940s; McGarrett and Danny get ready for the opening of their restaurant.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Grover's parents and brother arrive in Oahu for Thanksgiving; a thief is crushed to death by an empty safe.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: When a renowned urban vigilante is killed after making a citizen's arrest, the team delves into the world of super heroes and comic books to find the killer; Adam gets closer to finding out who killed his sister.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Midsomer hosts its 12th Annual Literary Festival, an author is found with his neck broken. More writers will die before the winner of the competition is announced.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby and DS Dan Scott investigate the shotgun murder of Jamie Cruikshank, a barman at the Maid in Splendour, a pub in the village of Midsomer Worthy.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the curate of the local church in Midsomer Parva is burned alive in the effigy of the straw woman, DCI Tom Barnaby and DS Dan Scott find themselves investigating what must be a murder.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Exactly nine years after Ferdy Villers killed himself, his entire family reunites for Christmas unaware that someone is out for revenge.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a survivalist is found murdered in his bombproof shelter, Barnaby unravels a dark conspiracy to reveal how far people will go to escape the end of the world.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Gated estate Challis Court is a tight-knit community for retired police officers, but when a new arrival is found dead, the other residents regard the murder as an affront. Barnaby realizes that the killer is likely an ex-police officer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Pastry chef Chrissie Larkton's mill has been in her family for centuries. She restored it and turned it into a thriving online business, but the popularity has overshadowed Lower Blissingham, and many of the villagers are not happy about it.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The residents of Elverton-Cum-Latterly battle in the Dominoes Competition that dates back decades, but when the event occurs the same night as a drag queen fundraiser for a terminally ill teenager, it results in a deadly clash of cultures.

programme.title: Super Sleuths - Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Midsomer Murders team opens up about their experience of working on the popular crime drama and provides insight into the overall process of bringing it to the small screen.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster's body goes missing on the night of his death, a sinister web of secrets and lies is exposed in the village of Little Malton. DCI Barnaby, DS Nelson and new Forensic Pathologist Kam Karimore are drawn into a macabre world of body-snatching as they seek to identify the villain.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Mysterious lights are seen in the sky over famous UFO hot-spot Cooper Hill. When a local forest-ranger suffers a strange death the visiting UFO spotters are convinced aliens are responsible. DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson unearth suspicions, betrayals and long-buried secrets in their search for the truth.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: An international cycling competition comes to the Midsomer village of Burwood Mantle. When the race leader is murdered, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson find themselves drawn into a ruthlessly competitive world of blackmail, bribery and bloodshed where winning comes at any cost.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Art comes to the picturesque Midsomer village of Angel's Rise with the opening of a new Sculpture Park. But when its launch is marred by murder, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson have to get creative to crack a case where art imitates death, and everything has a deeper meaning.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The discovery of a Saint's bones at an archaeological dig causes a stir in the village of Midsomer Cicely. But when the leader of the dig is murdered, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson soon realise that it's not only skeletons that have been long buried in the hallowed ground.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The annual fair and the daredevil riders of the Wall of Death come to Midsomer village Whitcombe Mallet. When the owner of an equestrian centre is trampled by his horse DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson have to unravel a complex feud from the past, where nothing is what it seems...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Peter and Caroline Cave are house-hunting in Midsomer Newton. Shortly before leaving their hotel they mention they haven't been able to find what they're looking for; "something old and derelict that they can do up." Anne Merrick tells them about Winyard, a tumbledown cottage in the woods, might be for sale. At the estate agents they are told the house is not yet available for viewing. Later that evening they find the house on their own. However, Caroline has read up on the cottage's haunted reputation and only reluctantly explores it with Peter. The next morning they are found strangled in their own car. DCI Barnaby starts the investigation with the help of PC Ben Jones and they come across the world of estate agents, identical twins, ghosts, piano wire, and more before another body turns up.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Villagers of Midsomer Barton are all set to celebrate Oak Apple Week, especially as the carnival queen event is set to return after an eight year absence. Yet the body of the mother of a deceased, one-time carnival queen, found in a stream, looks set to spoil things, as Barnaby and Jones find themselves digging up the past. From familiar faces, to drunken boasts and hidden obessions, it slowly becomes clear that the mother's daughter might be the key to solving the murder, when more deaths follow.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Wealthy, eccentric and obese aristocrat Freddy Butler drops dead, shortly after gathering all three of his wives at Haddington Hall to make an announcement. Although George Bullard is adamant his death is from natural causes, the case is far from simple when Freddy's solicitor is deliberately killed in a house fire shortly afterwards and Freddy's will goes missing. Barnaby and Jones find themselves investigating the extended Butler family, uncovering hidden secrets, illegitimate children and elusive treasure in the process.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Martin Barrett, a local council clerk living in Midsomer Worthy, is murdered during the night by shotgun, prompting Barnaby and Jones to find a motive for his murder. When they discover that Barrett was an expert blackmailer, his victims become prime suspects for his death - from a local pub landlord, a cleaner, a prominent member of the police board, to a former marine geologist. As they investigate, finding themselves drawn to the seaside, they slowly uncover deception, theft, attempted blackmail and hatred.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: In the village of Broughton, a ninety-year-old battle of the sexes has often occurred, with men trying to oppose an event that the women have managed to successfully hold without interruption, until it culminates with casualties on both sides - Mildred Danvers, an elderly woman who had returned on the day of a funeral and poisoned in her hotel room, and Rev. Anthony Gant, shot during a major event being held in the village green, in view of many. It soon becomes clear someone may have wished to kill both to cover up a dark truth, and soon Barnaby has to figure out who amongst the village wanted both dead, complicated further when Gant's curate is murdered next.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Villagers in Elverton-cum-Latterly are up in arms and divided, over the building of a supermarket. Things soon come to a head when independent environmental supervisor, Frank Hopkirk, is found stabbed to death at a Jubb's Timber Yard, the site of the new supermarket, by a pair of children. When Barnaby and Jones investigate to determine who wanted Hopkirk dead, they find out that he secretly came to the village under various aliases for sexual rendezvous with various women in fantasy role-playing scenarios, and that he had been making further investigations on the future development site and having doubts over claims it was contaminated. Either someone didn't like his investigations, or someone didn't like his sexual appetite, but either way, Barnaby finds himself investigating lies and more to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and DC Ben Jones (Jason Hughes) find themselves attempting to unravel the deaths of a choir tenor, and later a bird watcher, before more murders occur. The case is complicated by a rivalry between the Midsomer Worthy and Aston Wherry choirs, due to compete in an upcoming competition, and suspicions that an art scam is to be conducted, and soon Barnaby and Jones become concerned about a local woman, who they fear may become a victim herself. Particularly when it becomes clear the bird watcher had been photographing suspicious activity of late.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A few months ago, Annie Woodrow was arrested, accused of murdering her friend, Frances Trevelyan, on the motive of wanting Frances' husband. Her time in court has come, but DCI Barnaby is certain she still is holding things back in regards to the murder, and decides to monitor the trial. Yet a chance remark by Frances' youngest daughter, and a meeting with an old friend and psychiatrist, makes him begin to doubt the evidence for her conviction. Soon he and DC Jones, awaiting news of his promotion to DS, find themselves reinvestigating the case, and it soon becomes clear that they may have missed details that could implicate another in the murder.

programme.title: Poison: Breaking The Band
programme.desc: In the 1980s, metal band Poison were united in their determination to become rock stars. Through hard work and relentless promotion, they did indeed take the world by storm. Their off-stage excess and partying, along with their female following, was legendary. Festering jealousies and power struggles, worsening addictions, gladiatorial backstage fist fights and ultimately burnout from constant touring and partying were amongst the trials they faced.. So which of these ended up poisoning Poison?

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Fantasia grew up in a family that focused heavily on singing.Becoming a young teenage mother solidified her relationship with God. It was by chance that her neighborhood pushed her to try out for, and win, American Idol.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Jermaine Dupri’s career started as a 12 year old dancer. He quickly went on to become a successful record producer by the age of 16. Looking back on his accolades, he earned the right to be talked among the greatest songwriters of all time.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: With five gold albums and sixteen top forty singles, Con Funk Shun strode across the funk and R&B scene like a colossus for more than a decade. From their roots as high-school friends in Vallejo, California, they honed their chops at Stax records in Memphis, while developing an irrepressibly danceable sound. With hits like �Ffun,� �Shake & Dance With Me,� �Chase Me,� and �Love�s Train,� the group performed in sold-out arenas around the country, while showing off lavish outfits and tightly choreographed moves. But after 17 years together, a succession of personal conflicts caused the band to fall apart. And a decade later, one their founding members was killed in circumstances at once mysterious and chilling. For this episode, the remaining original members, along with family and friends, gather for the first time to tell the story of a truly �Unsung� band

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Led by the �Father of the Falsetto,� Bobby DeBarge, Switch paved the way for the hit-making DeBarge family with soulful, sensual ballads. But addictions and egos brought their brotherhood to a bitter end.

programme.title: The Bobby Debarge Story
programme.desc: BOBBY DEBARGE, lead singer of the 70�s R&B/Funk Band SWITCH, and eldest sibling of the world-famous pop group �DEBARGE� finds his life in peril as he struggles with fame and fortune while coping with the memories of his dysfunctional childhood.

programme.title: Barrett-Jackson: REVVED UP

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Danny Pihl relies on the experience of veteran cutters Dwayne and Chuck to take down massive old-growth trees; Craig Rygaard discovers son Jason made a catastrophic and costly miscalculation; Frank Harkness races to transport $100,000 worth of logs.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In Alaska, a family emergency takes Mark from the yarder seat with no time for a shutdown.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Mike Pihl looks for help from a logging legend; Jason Rygaard faces his biggest test as the new boss; the Harkness crew battles winter storms and vertical terrain in the Cascade Mountains; Wade Etienne goes after valuable hardwood giants.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Brandon Harkness fights his way up a mountainside; Mike Pihl get his 52-ton yarder lodged between trees; Wade Ettiene's Big Mama takes a two-inch steel sawtooth to her face; and Buckin' Billy's son Hogan loses his grip while cutting a tree.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Danny Pihl gambles on horsepower.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Rygaard Logging fights to fix a crooked skyline, crossing a deep valley on their longest road yet.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: A breakdown forces Jason Rygaard to choose between his crew's safety and finishing the job; Frank Harkness is caught in a whiteout while moving the excavator on a narrow mountainside logging road.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Jason Rygaard fights the weather while hauling heavy, slick trees on the steepest setting of the season; Danny Pihl and his veteran crew precisely drop 250-foot, old-growth cedars next to a group of cabins.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Jason Rygaard races to clear a hillside in time to fill four logging trucks; Jay R Harkness fights to control the untethered Tigercat on a steep, snow-covered mountainside; Bucking Billy and his son Hogan battle a forest of hang-ups and widow-makers.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Four companies of loggers risk their lives to chop down timber while dealing with mechanical failures, brutal weather and rugged terrain in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: J.M. Browning strives to meet a big deadline; Stump Branch Logging tempts fate by jury-rigging old equipment; Gustafson races the weather to build an access road; Pihl Logging hauls in the forest's cash crop.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The loggers race to stay one step ahead of a storm approaching the Oregon coast; Jesse pushes his crew to meet their deadline; muddy roads trap Stump Branch trucks; Robby battles for control; lumber market slump.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Some crews shut down while others struggle to stay afloat after stormy weather arrives with a vengeance; the stalled housing market hits home for the loggers.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The news of upcoming layoffs worries the men; Gustafson Logging tries to get back on track; Browning races to meet a big deadline; Pihl Logging is under pressure to finish its Pig Farm job.

programme.desc: A 1547 edition of "The Dance of Death;" two sculptures from Dr. Seuss' taxidermy collection; a tear-gas baton.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A medal from British explorer Captain Cook comes into in the shop; Chum checks out a golf putter from the famed 1963 Frank Sinatra Invitational; Chumlee tries to calm Rick down when his stress level hits a new high.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Eighteenth-century engravings of the Spanish Armada; wax recordings from the 1890s; a Coca-Cola robot from the 1980s; a 1900s Teddy Roosevelt Bears pitcher.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A seller brings in an antique high wheel bike; Chumlee sells one of Rick's prized Japanese katanas to UFC President Dana White; Rick tries to score a restored grand piano from the 1800s and an original Walkman cassette player.

programme.desc: A guitar pedal used by Kurt Cobain is brought into the shop; an 1842 Book of Mormon appears to be the most expensive book to ever come through the door.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A compilation of the best scenes from all 11 seasons of A&E's hit series Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After visiting a popular burger restaurant, Willie and Jase get into a debate over which of them cooks the best burger, prompting them to challenge one another to a cooking contest.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old GI Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie gets a soft serve machine for himself, he tells the guys they can't use it until they're done working.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase finds out Jep is planning to buy his kids a fancy playhouse from a catalogue, he and the guys decide to build one for Jep them selves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Sadie spends the day at Duck Commander for a school project, the guys try to show her the ins-and-outs of how a successful company works.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family pulls together a family reunion to give Mia a big send-off before her surgery.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Governor of Louisiana announces that he will be coming to Duck Commander to present Willie with a commerce award, John Luke volunteers to give the introduction speech.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With Reed's graduation day approaching, Jase decides to take Reed frog hunting the night before, like he did on the day of his own graduation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie agrees to sponsor Mountain Man's radio contest, a "Hands on a Hardbody" competition, he somehow finds himself competing against Si for Mountain Man's last minute prize.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Robertsons participate in the West Monroe Fire Department pancake breakfast, the firemen invite Willie and his brothers to train with the department for the day.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie contemplates re-branding the Duck Commander image, Jase takes issue with having an outsider design their image.

programme.desc: The guys realize it is time for the annual cleaning of the duck blinds when they come across a gator using one as a home.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Phil discovers more beaver activity on the Robertson land, he recruits Jase, Jep, and Si to get rid of them. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie bring Bella to her first day of karate practice.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie takes a business trip to Scotland to expand his duck call business, he brings the entire family along so they can reconnect with their Scottish roots.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A special holiday episode of Duck Dynasty shows when the Robertson family took over the Thanksgiving special of a local TV show "Good Morning Arklamiss."

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival -- Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich for his Duck Diner menu, and enlists the help of the ladies to be his "taste testers."

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, when Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves, Willie signs Kay and Bobo up for a doggie obedience class.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team search for Jonah, a violent and desperate criminal facing 20 years in jail. The trail goes stale when Dog runs into evasive family members and an angry girlfriend.

programme.desc: This fugitive's sketchy associates and footloose ways spell trouble for Dog in today's hunt.

programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission--to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks but that's not the case with "Dog" Chapman. To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk hold the keys to bringing him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission--to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team, and Leland is feeling caught in the middle. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision tempers flare.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound or make it worse?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In a last ditch attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks but that's not the case with "Dog" Chapman. To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog and the Posse for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. While on the Big Island and Dog convinces the felon's friends and family to join forces and then learns he has fled to another island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Colorado Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A big heart can be a problem for a bail bondsman and today's hunt is a case in point. Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Throughout history, humans have buried their dead in caves or chambers, in pyramids or in some form of a tomb; ancient tombs were visual memorials for the dead; in China, a vast necropolis was constructed as a way to connect to the afterlife.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: During World War II, a number of persistent mysteries were born, including unexplained stories about everything from lost gold to secret societies and highly advanced technology.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Humans can survive catastrophic injuries and deadly scenarios that defy the odds in ways that are inexplicable; these survivals challenge the best attempts to explain how anyone could live through such circumstances.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Could a cache of fantastic riches have been buried centuries ago on a tiny island in the North Atlantic?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: King Arthur, England's first pop culture superhero; his exploits inspired blockbuster movies and television series like "Middle Earth", "Harry Potter", "Game of Thrones" and "Star Wars"; the significant impact of Arthurian legend on Western culture.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Whether surviving freezing temperatures, diving unfathomable depths in one breath, or lifting weighty objects, superhuman feats never cease to amaze; pulling them off could be a matter of training, willpower, genetics, or something more mysterious.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: All over the world, there are giant monoliths that ancient ancestors carved out of solid rock.

programme.desc: Why is it that America's greatest monuments continue to enthrall us decades--and sometimes centuries--after their creation?

programme.desc: Despite all of our modern technology, there are aspects of some vanishings that are bizarre and simply can't be explained.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A sudden illness takes hold of a beloved doctor, leaving her family helpless as the illness takes a fatal turn; the investigation into her death takes her family on a journey into the dark heart of a monster who has been at their side all along.

programme.title: Behind the Headlines
programme.desc: Interviews with people who knew Markoff and his victims, as well as investigators and prosecutors who speak on camera about the case for the very first time.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade; while one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search for a missing couple holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in Saginaw, Mich., but her family and friends don't believe it; as police dig deep to get to the truth, they discover a shocking secret they never saw coming.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The community of Macon, Ga., is gripped in a wave of terror when a beautiful law student disappears from her apartment complex; the shocking discovery of a body leads investigators uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A jilted lover takes to the internet to stalk her ex and threaten his girlfriend; when she finally follows through on her violent threats, detectives find themselves entangled in a deadly web of deception.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A family faces off with violent attackers trying to rob its jewelry store; two young women flee from a driver who is out to get them on a terrifying road trip; convenience and crime collide at a bank ATM.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A thief with a knife and a big idea meets a store employee and his bigger blade; a ride share driver has his evening shattered as gunfire rips through his truck; a devious plot involving a bank teller and an ATM lead to a near death encounter.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A local trip becomes a harrowing ordeal for one family when they're surrounded by an angry mob that attacks their vehicle; a laundromat owner is beaten by unruly patrons from the business next door; a property manager is confronted by a gunman.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A typical Sunday morphs into a gunfight when two armed men invade a family's home; an unsuspecting impound lot worker checks out a disturbance and is nearly mowed down by an irate woman in a two-ton truck; a car owner tries to stop a carjacking.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A longstanding feud comes to a head when two neighbors confront each other with guns; a school bus driver goes on a dangerous high-speed chase to outrun an irate parent.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A young woman is brutally attacked on the train by an assailant; a coach witnesses a student with a gun roam the hall and helps avert a potential school shooting; a store clerk faces a suspect trying to rob him with an unusual weapon.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A man confronts a group of young adults about smoking on the train and is nearly beaten to death; a rideshare driver picks up a sick man, but a traffic jam throws the ailing man into a violent frenzy.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A retail store worker puts her life on the line to save a prized puppy stolen before her very eyes; a homeowner witnesses his family held at gunpoint and fights back against the assailants.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: Intruders wake sleeping homeowners and a deadly shootout ensues; a model and her husband are robbed at gunpoint and dodge a barrage of bullets.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: The team faces a slew of dramatic night shift calls including a pregnant woman who was assaulted, and a four-year-old boy with abdominal pain.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: The New Orleans EMS crew reaches out to lend a hand to some down-and-out citizens, including a homeless man fighting an uphill battle on multiple fronts, a man having a panic attack, and multiple shooting victims in the streets.

programme.desc: A typical Sunday morphs into a gunfight when two armed men invade a family's home; an unsuspecting impound lot worker checks out a disturbance and is nearly mowed down by an irate woman in a two-ton truck; a car owner tries to stop a carjacking.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A longstanding feud comes to a head when two neighbors confront each other with guns; a school bus driver goes on a dangerous high-speed chase to outrun an irate parent.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Just after the last day of school in 1984, 15-year-old Reesa Trexler is found murdered in her grandparents' home.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In July of 1970, the brutal murder of single mom Loretta Jones leaves four-year-old Heidi motherless. Nearly 40 years later, she vows to solve her mother's cold case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Montana detectives track down a man who murdered his wife.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A mother is suspected in the murders of two of her daughters, when her third daughter finally convinces police to reopen two cold cases.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: On a summer night in 1987 a mother worries and waits for her 19-year-old daughter to come home. But Diana never comes home and she's found raped and strangled.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police solve a murder when divers find a skeleton in a car.

programme.desc: A highly-regarded California arson investigator is suspected of murder.

programme.desc: The body of Lori Nesson is found in a ditch in 1974, yet her death is not ruled a homicide. After four decades, the cause of death is changed to homicide.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: A young man survives a near fatal shooting, rebuilds his life, and starts looking for love, only to disappear without a trace. His family refuses to give up their search, even as evidence mounts that he was lured into a web of deception and doom.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: When a kindhearted janitor is beaten to death in his home, it doesn’t take long to learn he was embroiled in a love triangle with his wife and a close friend. Was this just a random attack, or is there something far more sinister behind the murder?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: A single mom and her three kids are found brutally murdered inside their home. Investigators uncover multiple suspects, including an ex skirting child support and the wife of a former lover, and a secret phone may be the key to nailing their killer.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman is swept off her feet by a flashy, older man who lavishes her with attention and gifts, but soon learns her new man is actually the kingpin of a massive interstate drug operation.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young mom joins the police force to provide a better life for her family, but when she discovers her husband has been hanging around with some shady characters, she is desperate to find out more.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young aspiring actress falls madly in love with her sophisticated, older boss. But his toxic love manipulates her, and she agrees to go down any dark and deadly path he tells her to in order to prove her devotion to him.

programme.title: When Love Kills: The Falicia Blakely Story
programme.desc: All Falicia ever wanted was a better life and she found it with Dino. He promised her the world and all she had to do for it was to kill.

programme.title: Safe Room
programme.desc: After Ian accidentally witnesses a break-in in the house across the street and records the horrific murder of the homeowner, Lila becomes embroiled in a deadly struggle to protect her son.

programme.title: Deadly Dispatch
programme.desc: After her best friend IS tragically murdered in an apparent robbery gone wrong, Tiffany Jackson takes justice in her own hands to find his killer.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: When an accomplice to a 2006 murder is gunned down in a neighborhood bar three years later, police suspect the nephew of a world renowned boxer who waited patiently to seize his opportunity for revenge.

programme.title: Sins of the City

programme.title: Mariachi gringo
programme.desc: Edward, un apasionado por la música mexicana, se siente atrapado en la rutina de la pequeña ciudad donde reside. Con el propósito de huir de todo, Edward se muda a México para convertirse en un mariachi.

programme.title: Soy de la frontera verde
programme.desc: Don Hugo un poderoso narcotraficante, muere en circunstacias muy extrañas, aunque todo indica que lo envenenaron. Su hija, doña Fernanda Morales, no dejará cabos sueltos y vengará la muerte de su padre encontrando al culpable.

programme.title: Un ángel en peligro
programme.desc: La felicidad de una familia se quiebra cuando secuestran a su hija. Al mismo tiempo, se descubrirá la red de engaños entre su sobrino y su esposa, además de un nexo con un narcotraficante.

programme.title: A ellas les gustan mayores
programme.desc: Ricardo está casado con Miranda, una bella mujer de afortunada posición social. Sin embargo, Ricardo la engaña con una mujer más joven que él.

programme.title: Cigarrito Bañado
programme.desc: Lucio huye de una deuda y de un amigo peligroso. En el camino conoce a Ximena, una mujer que seduce a los hombres y luego les roba el dinero.

programme.title: Cometa
programme.desc: Un chico pierde todas las cosas que lo motivan a vivir. Se ha quedado sin trabajo, casa y familia, pero en su recorrido por las calles se encuentra a Cometa, un perro callejero.

programme.title: Las viejas del sicario
programme.desc: Una película de acción de narcos.

programme.title: La esclava Isaura
programme.desc: Una historia que se desenvuelve a mediados del siglo XIX en Brasil y relata la vida de Isaura, una esclava mestiza, hija de la esclava del Comendador y el capataz de la hacienda.

programme.title: La esclava Isaura
programme.desc: Una historia que se desenvuelve a mediados del siglo XIX en Brasil y relata la vida de Isaura, una esclava mestiza, hija de la esclava del Comendador y el capataz de la hacienda.

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Min-joon profesa su amor por Song-yi y luego desaparece. Con el paso del tiempo, Song-yi y otros creen que lo han visto.

programme.title: Génesis
programme.desc: Adaptación de uno de los libros más reconocidos de la Biblia, que aborda la historia del origen de la humanidad, invitando a entender el presente, volviendo al principio de todo. La caída de Lucifer, la vida de Adán y Eva, Noé y el diluvio, y otros.

programme.title: Señora del Destino
programme.desc: María do Carmo es una madre de cinco hijos que triunfó en la vida con mucha lucha y tesón, pero que todavía tendrá una batalla que luchar: obtener el cariño de su hija quien fue secuestrada cuando era una recién nacida.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Melissa queda devastada al saber que Görkem debe marcharse y confronta a Fevzi. Necati intenta usar a Reyhan para manipular a Cüneyt. Orhan amenaza a Büsra si se atreve a revelar lo que sabe. Mahinur y Metin temen por la seguridad de Melissa.

programme.title: Moisés y los diez mandamientos
programme.desc: La historia de Moisés desde su nacimiento y llegada a manos de la princesa Henutmire hasta llevar a su pueblo a la Tierra Prometida. Su crianza como un verdadero príncipe egipcio junto a su tío Ramsés.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Cristina se da cuenta de que se casó con otro solo por darle celos a su ex. Tres años después vuelve a Miami sin un peso y busca a Leonardo. Latiffa está embarazada, Mohamed está feliz.

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Min-joon profesa su amor por Song-yi y luego desaparece. Con el paso del tiempo, Song-yi y otros creen que lo han visto.

programme.title: El laberinto de Alicia
programme.desc: Alicia Vega, psicóloga del colegio Los Ángeles, especialista en prevención y tratamiento de abusos sexuales a menores, inicia una investigación cuando Valentina, una niña adorable y frágil, parece estar en la mira de un abusador.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Jade está en Miami, eso la hace feliz, Cristina se entera y se lo cuenta a Lucas. Él la busca en todos los hoteles, hasta que la encuentra y la toma de un brazo para llevársela lejos.

programme.title: Eres mi estrella
programme.desc: La compañía que maneja el grupo ídolo ANJELL insiste en contratar un nuevo cantante porque la voz del cantante principal Tae Kyung, ya no es la misma.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle

At Emerson College, we find out.

Tonight’s edition of “Gamechangers” focuses on people who are quietly making a difference right here in our community – from a Dorchester artist creating a new “face” for playing cards to a team making the sport of tennis accessible to all.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Anthony Everett tours a unique home for sale, where the proceeds are targeted for charity thanks to the wishes of its prominent late owner. We travel to Great Barrington, where a couple has lovingly restored a chapel on the grounds of a former private school, built in memory of three members of the community who died tragically – and now a respite for hikers along the Appalachian Trail. In Concord, Anthony dines at a special cafe staffed by incarcerated individuals who are learning new skills. And in Brighton, we visit a local co-op community that supports young adults who are experiencing homelessness.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle is going a little nutty tonight over NUTS! Cwcashews, almonds, peanuts, even acorns are on the menu. We visit Arcade Snacks in Auburn and Q’s Nuts in Somerville for their veritable nut buffets and choices. We learn about the benefits of acorn flour and how to make it. We are also introduced to high-powered almond butter, courtsy of local Bear Butter and discover how local researchers are trying to tame nut allergies in patients.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Explore Retro pieces from the past; from roller rinks, fabric wrapping paper and typewriters, find out what’s making a comeback.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: The Ground Round, Tech Hi-Fi, Strawberries Records – all popular local brands, all brought back to life with new local ventures. We check them out tonight.

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: It’s New Hampshire’s second-largest county, home to some of its best-known towns, and to famed Franconia Notch. Tonight Ted Reinstein shares the autumn beauty of Grafton County, N.H. He discovers how “The Notch” was once saved from development, and explores scenic views along the Cross-New Hampshire Adventure Trail. Hard to believe it’s been 20 years since the Old Man in the Mountain crumbled; Ted meets the team who designed “profilers” that help simulate the rocky view. And at Polly’s Pancake Parlor, Ted digs into a half-stack and catches up with old friends.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: Who says you can’t go home again? Tonight we hitch a ride with Nicole Estaphan to her hometown of Grafton, Massachusetts. This rural Central Mass. town may be small but it packs big flavors - warm loaves at Bread Guy Breads and a global selection of fine wine and cheeses at Pecorino. Grafton is also home to the world's largest collection of antique Willard Clocks. And far from Tufts University’s Medford campus is the university’s Grafton training ground for future veterinarians, Cummings School of Veterinary Medicine.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Explore grand hotels that are only, 'A Tank Away.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: If you love all things 19th Century (think Bridgerton or Downton Abbey), impeccable gardens, and antique decor, then you will enjoy tonight’s trip to some of the area’s great estates. We begin at Glen Magna Farms in Danvers. Now an events venue and public park, the estate was once the summer retreat for the Peabody and Endicott families (purchased for a mere $4,000). We tour the Nichols House Museum, a Beacon Hill brownstone whose former owner inspired a musical. Also tonight, prepare to be awed by the grounds at Blithewold, an estate that was only owned by women.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: A look at art, cuisine, and advocacy, all infused with culture in celebration of Hispanic Heritage Month. We take a look at removing the stigma around accessing mental health resources with a counselor with Venezuelan roots and talk with a Seekonk woman using arts and crafts to do the same. We meet a husband and wife from Cambridge sharing cultural stories through their Pan-Latin music. Anthony Everett learns the art of empanada-creation with a local Argentinian chef and we catch up with a Brazillian artist focused on creating sustainable fashion with nature.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Just six miles from downtown Boston, Malden is experiencing a renaissance. We stop by District Kitchen for handmade noodles and dumplings and check out the local art at Gallery at 57. Meanwhile, if you think you know Paul Revere’s turf, we have news for you from the town of Canton – where we hit the Paul Revere Heritage Site and Northern Spy restaurant, which focuses on locally-sourced ingredients. Finally, Nicole Estaphan heads to the Metrowest community of Holliston where she meets a father-daughter artist team and submerges herself in a minus-200-degree cryotherapy tank.

Up in Salem, we’re bypassing the “witch thing” to check out the city’s other attractions, including its annual film festival. Finally, a visit to Norwood - where a huge vintage market is a big draw for shoppers and a new grocer is transforming the shopping chore.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: Historic Harwich is heaven for beach lovers…but it’s also filled with history, abundant natural beauty, and artists working to keep Cape Cod traditions alive. Erika Tarantal meets a local carver who makes duck decoys in the tradition of a renowned local craftsman. We visit a cranberry bog and a lavender farm, and at a Harwich Mariners game, meet the folks trying to bring the Cape Cod Baseball League’s Hall of Fame back to life. Finally, no trip to the Cape is complete without some reading material; we hit a local stop along the Cape Cod Bookstore Trail.

programme.title: Searching for Johnny
programme.desc: (2022) The disappearance of Johnny Gosch is one of Iowa's longest running, and most notorious mysteries. In 1982, the 12-year-old paperboy in West Des Moines vanished without a trace. Forty years later, KCCI uncovers where the investigation stands.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight NewsCenter 5’s Maria Stephanos joins us with profiles of local luminaries who have made giving back to their communities their mission.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: February is American Heart Month, and Nicole Estaphan is sharing personal stories that stress the importance of awareness, early screening, and prevention. Nicole meets a transplant recipient who had no warning of his life-threatening disease, and a young mom who suffered a heart attack while pregnant – one of a growing number of younger patients who experience a cardiac event. She talks to doctors about risk and the importance of a heart-healthy lifestyle. Finally, Nicole shares her own diagnosis of a cardiac condition that affects 20 million American adults.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: The Head of the Charles regatta began with a wonky stopwatch back in 1965 – and is now one of the world’s most famous rowing spectacles. If you’ve ever wondered what all the fuss is on the Charles River each October, we spent the last year connecting with elite racers, weekend warriors, and people who are committed to expanding access to rowing for all. On the eve of this year’s races, an insider’s look – it isn’t just for preppies anymore.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Hidden Gems aren’t hard to find in New England (if you know where to look!). Tonight we follow the breadcrumbs to a French bakery tucked into a liquor store in Milford. Forget candlepins - we’re checking out a duckpin bowling alley, and dining on the “Mystery Monday” menu at Metacom Kitchen in Warren, R.I.. And tucked into a former Methodist Church in Charlton, Mass., is a sewing “sanctuary” that’s still lifting spirits. Plus, we head to Gillette Stadium to meet the New England Revolution -- a record-breaking team that’s been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight we’re back on the hunt for hidden history. Anthony Everett visits Brockton where he rides on a historic fire engine that battled the devastating Strand Theatre fire in 1941, and a local museum remembers the 13 lives lost. We take a stroll with the author of “Boston’s Oldest Buildings and Where to Find Them.” And tucked away among the storefronts inside the Prudential Center are actual relics of three Catholic saints.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: When is a bait shop more than a bait shop? When it holds generations’ worth of local history, in the form of cherished photographs. For decades, the late owner of Surfland on Plum Island photographed locals who had landed huge fish, and her family continues the tradition today. We also meet a group of Italian divers who traveled to the U.S. to explore the Andrea Doria, the ocean liner that sank off Nantucket in 1956 and has intrigued divers ever since. And in the tiny town of West Townsend, we peruse the largest collection of antique American tall case clocks for sale in the United States.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Ted Reinstein is looking up, down, around, and above to discover quirky systems, codes, and features around Boston that are “hiding in plain sight!” Parts of the city are encircled by a high-wire “eruv” – Ted will tell you what that is. We meet a Boston man who makes art in out-of-the-way places (and manages to live rent-free in the city). Boston officials share the story behind those tiny colored plastic disks embedded in city streets. And while the 1,200 fire alarm boxes in Boston may look like a relic - they work! We meet the team charged with maintaining them.
